site.name: GrowWell Landscapes and Constructions
site.tagline: Thoughtful landscape design and garden care
site.description: GrowWell Landscapes designs, builds, and maintains inviting outdoor spaces, from terrace gardens and lawns to complete landscape transformations.

seo.title: GrowWell Landscapes - Professional Landscaping Services
seo.description: Elevate your outdoor spaces with GrowWell Landscapes. We create terrace gardens, lawns, planting concepts, and practical landscape solutions for homes and commercial properties.
seo.keywords: landscaping services, landscape contractor, terrace garden, rooftop garden, garden design, lawn maintenance, vertical garden, villa landscaping, balcony garden, irrigation system, landscape design, garden maintenance

about.title: Landscaping with Clarity, Care, and Lasting Appeal
about.description: We approach every outdoor space with a simple goal: make it look better, work better, and feel easier to enjoy. Our team combines design thinking, practical planning, and hands-on execution to shape gardens and landscapes that suit the property and the people using it.
